title: Robotics Engineers
description: Research, design, develop, or test robotic applications.

tasks.text: Review or approve designs, calculations, or cost estimates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Process or interpret signals or sensor data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Debug robotics programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Build, configure, or test robots or robotic applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create back-ups of robot programs or parameters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide technical support for robotic systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design end-of-arm tooling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design robotic systems, such as automatic vehicle control, autonomous vehicles, advanced displays, advanced sensing, robotic platforms, computer vision, or telematics systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise technologists, technicians, or other engineers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design software to control robotic systems for applications, such as military defense or manufacturing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research on robotic technology to create new robotic systems or system capabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate mechanical failures or unexpected maintenance problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Integrate robotics with peripherals, such as welders, controllers, or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate robotic systems or prototypes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Install, calibrate, operate, or maintain robots.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research into the feasibility, design, operation, or performance of robotic mechanisms, components, or systems, such as planetary rovers, multiple mobile robots, reconfigurable robots, or man-machine interactions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document robotic application development, maintenance, or changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design automated robotic systems to increase production volume or precision in high-throughput operations, such as automated ribonucleic acid (RNA) analysis or sorting, moving, or stacking production materials.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Write algorithms or programming code for ad hoc robotic applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make system device lists or event timing charts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design or program robotics systems for environmental clean-up applications to minimize human exposure to toxic or hazardous materials or to improve the quality or speed of clean-up operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan mobile robot paths and teach path plans to robots.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design robotics applications for manufacturers of green products, such as wind turbines or solar panels, to increase production time, eliminate waste, or reduce costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Automate assays on laboratory robotics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
